items.title: Portland has been pulled into a full-on arena hostage situation
items.body_excerpt: And the NBA doesn't appear willing to help one bit. Good morning. It's July 21 and LeBron James is still a free agent. Let's basketball. Ignoring that the Warriors and Clippers each recently changed zip codes, no NBA team has relocated since 2012, when the Nets moved from New…

items.title: Summer League Reality Check
items.body_excerpt: Every July, the NBA world seems to swing from one extreme to the other. One rookie scores 30 points and suddenly he’s a future All-Star. Another lottery pick struggles through a few games, and questions about whether he was picked too high begin to surface. The truth is usually…

items.title: Sensible and sad: Lu Dort trade grades

items.title: How Ryan Clark Really Got Fired from ESPN
items.body_excerpt: Back when Stephen Colbert was funnier , he had this running gag in his Colbert Report Bill O’Reilly satire character. When commenting on racial matters, Colbert would make a big show of literal color blindness. “I don’t see color,” Colbert would bellow. He’d inform the viewer…
